name: luteolin
contraindications: excessive intake may cause gastrointestinal irritation or interact with medications.
Excessive internal use may cause constipation or dry mucous membranes
may interact with blood thinners due to tannin content【859641390196180†L297
description: luteolin is a compound reported in albizia lebbeck and alchemilla vulgaris. Available references are still early and incomplete.
